overview.description: Canada represents Accenture's second-largest North American market with 12,500+ professionals across 9 cities. The country's strong technology ecosystem — anchored by the Toronto-Montreal AI Corridor — combined with robust financial services, energy transition initiatives, and accelerated government digital modernization creates a $1.8B revenue base growing at 9.4% annually. Key strategic themes include AI/ML advisory, cloud migration, open banking implementation, and green energy transition consulting.
